pageContext.name: Lord's Blade Ciaran SD
pageContext.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures are proud to present the latest SD collectible, Lord's Blade Ciaran!  This is the sixth SD statue in the Dark Souls SD lineup and the first resin SD statue in all of First 4 Figures. Lord's Blade Ciaran is one of the Four Knights of Gwyn, Lord of Cinder and member of the Lord's Blades. The statue is inspired by the moment when players first meet Ciaran in the coliseum at the Oolacile Township with the base fashioned after the pillars and cracked ground found there.  Ciaran's armor—Lord's Blade Set has been beautifully replicated here with realistic details. Her Gold and Dark Silver Tracer are key details included in this statue as well! Her armor is common to all Lord's Blades but the porcelain mask is unique to her, representing a mark of honor.
